image.description: Input image as a public HTTPS URL or base64 data URI. Optional for `query`; required for `caption`, `point`, and `detect`.

target.description: Object phrase to locate for `point` and `detect` tasks (e.g. 'person wearing a red shirt').

reasoning.description: Enable reasoning trace for the `query` task.

max_tokens.description: Max tokens to generate for `query` and `caption`.

max_objects.description: Max objects to return for `point` and `detect`.

stream.description: Return incremental tokens for `query` and `caption`. `point` and `detect` do not support streaming.
